ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot patiently waiting at a bus stop.  The first frame shows the robot standing with arms at its sides, conveying a calm, waiting posture. In the second frame, the robot's left arm raises slightly, as if checking a watch or phone (though the robot has neither). In the third frame, both arms return to their neutral position. The fourth frame shows the robot's right arm raising slightly, mimicking a look around. The final frame shows both arms returning to a relaxed posture, signifying continued waiting. This sequence uses subtle movements to express the nuances of waiting.

frames.beat: robot stands at the bus stop, patiently waiting
left arm lifts slightly, checking the time
both arms return to rest, still waiting
right arm lifts, looking down the road
both arms settle, the wait continues
